response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 13+ years of experience, solid full-stack and systems background, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and cloud-native AI delivery at the scale expected for a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer. Customer-facing technical leadership and multi-agent framework experience are also not clearly evidenced.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production software across web, backend, and embedded; strong polyglot (TS/Node, Python-adjacent, D, Java, C++)
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Track record of teaching, workshops, and open-source leadership (GISCollective) indicating mentorship and communication skills
concerns: No explicit evidence of production RAG pipelines, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability frameworks
Limited demonstrated experience designing AI systems on major cloud platforms (AWS CDK mentioned, but not AI-specific architectures)
No clear customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery leadership at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic tooling experience at re:cinq
Breadth of engineering experience and mentorship
